sql:
--INSERT INTO fraud_alerts
SELECT
txn1.account_id,
txn1.transaction_id AS original_id,
txn2.transaction_id AS fraudulent_id,
-- Calculation: sqrt((lat2-lat1)^2 + (lon2-lon1)^2)
SQRT(
POWER(CAST(txn1.lat AS DOUBLE) - CAST(txn2.lat AS DOUBLE), 2) +
POWER(CAST(txn1.lon AS DOUBLE) - CAST(txn2.lon AS DOUBLE), 2)
) AS spatial_diff
FROM txn1
INNER JOIN txn2 ON txn1.account_id = txn2.account_id
WHERE txn1.transaction_id <> txn2.transaction_id
-- The 10-minute "impossible travel" window
AND txn2.event_time BETWEEN txn1.event_time - INTERVAL '10' MINUTE AND txn1.event_time
-- The Validation: Flag anything where the coordinate delta is > 0.01 (approx 1.1km)
AND SQRT(
POWER(CAST(txn1.lat AS DOUBLE) - CAST(txn2.lat AS DOUBLE), 2) +
POWER(CAST(txn1.lon AS DOUBLE) - CAST(txn2.lon AS DOUBLE), 2)
) > 0.01;
